name: list_dir
description: List contents of a directory. Use this to discover files and navigate the directory structure before reading specific files. In restricted mode paths must resolve inside the current registered source scope; allow-all/non-restricted permission modes can use all registered sources, and open mode can also use absolute local paths outside registered sources.

path.description: Directory path to list. In open mode, absolute local paths outside registered sources are also accepted.

recursive.description: If true, list contents recursively up to max_depth. Default: false.

max_depth.description: Maximum recursion depth when recursive is true. Default: 3.

pattern.description: Optional filename pattern filter (e.g., '*.md', '*.pdf'). Only files matching this pattern are included.
